title: antidesma velutinum
intro: Antidesma velutinum, also known as the Velvet Tree or Velvet-leaved Wood Sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Antidesma velutinum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antiseptic. The herbal preparations of Antidesma velutinum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, wounds, and digestive issues.
